meaning: adj.倦怠的,冷漠的,情绪低落的
examples: She looked washed out and listless.
He was listless and pale and wouldn't eat much.
The illness left her feeling listless and depressed.
Three of the malnourished tigers are shedding fur, are listless and have lost their appetites.
Half a dozen dogs lie sorry-looking or listless in the yard -- thin, hungry and thirsty.
